description: EXAMPLE failed candidates from Wave 0.5 selection pipeline. NOT real rejected candidates — illustrative only.

rejections.detail: Safety score 0.31 below minimum threshold 0.50 (driven by high hemolysis proxy 0.89).
Ensemble score 0.55 below synthesis gate threshold 0.65.
Novelty score 0.35 below minimum threshold 0.40 (near-duplicate of known AMP).
Sequence similarity 0.82 to already-selected candidate WAVE0.5-003 exceeds diversity threshold 0.70.
Family SEED-003 has reached its cap of 2 panel slots.
Sequence contains non-canonical amino-acid symbols 'B' at positions 5-8.
Panel budget limited to 24 candidates; lowest-ranked qualifying candidate excluded.
